sheet_name: แบบขยายบันได ST.1 แบบขยายบันได ST.2
source_image: image/บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_01/บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_01_หน้า13.png
view_title: แปลนบันได ST.1 + รูปตัดบันได ST.1
grid_source: mk_test/t4/บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_01_หน้า00_gridline.json

elements.grid_ref: between จอดรถ (+0.20) and พักผ่อน/เฉลียง (+0.60/+0.50), near grid2-3 x gridA
elements.material: ลูกตั้ง/ลูกนอนบันได ผิวปูกระเบื้องเซรามิค 8"x8", จมูกบันได อลูมิเนียมสีเงิน ร่อง PVC ขนาด 2 นิ้ว
elements.dimension_m: plan run 3.65 total (0.45+3.20), width 3.00 (with an additional short return leg)

elements.description: Section view shows the stair rising from จอดรถ (+0.20) up through intermediate steps to เฉลียง/พักผ่อน (+0.50/+0.60); individual riser count is not enumerated with tick marks on this plan/section, only the overall run/landing dimensions (0.45, 3.20 in plan; small vertical step marks visible in section but not individually dimensioned).

warnings: PATTERN unchanged from t3 ('plan'). This sheet combines a plan view (แปลนบันได ST.1, has grid_ref) and a section view (รูปตัดบันได ST.1, no rebar) of the same stair; kept classified as 'plan' since the plan view with grid position is the primary/title view and both describe one element (ST.1). The section portion, taken alone, would fit 'side_profile' -- flagged here rather than split into a separate file since inventory-first review confirms both views describe the identical single stair, unlike wc1 sections (หน้า12) which had no accompanying plan at all.

Independent read done first (own scan of both plan+section drawings), then cross-checked against t3's หน้า13_stair_st1.json: content matches almost exactly. One genuine reading discrepancy carried forward from t3 (not resolved by this independent read either): grid position read as 'near grid2-3 x gridA' vs t2's earlier 'grid1-2 x gridA' -- both are approximate free-text estimates since no grid line is drawn directly through this detail box; still needs zoom/cross-reference against the architectural floor plan (หน้า06) to resolve.
Exact individual step count/riser heights remain not confidently countable at this resolution.
ST.1 location referenced against the main building grid is approximate free-text, not a precise grid intersection.
